title: The Man Who Became a Kaiju
overview: Kafka Hibino has almost abandoned his dream of joining the anti-Kaiju "Defense Force." He now works in Kaiju clean-up, disposing of the bodies of slain Kaiju and thinking back with regret to the days he spent with his childhood friend Mina Ashiro, captain of Defense Force's Third Division.

title: The Kaiju Who Defeats Kaiju
overview: After turning into a Kaiju, Kafka is forced to flee. His escape is interrupted, however, by the arrival of another Kaiju...

title: Revenge Match
overview: Kafka arrives for one last shot at the Defense Force entry exam... but can he pass while keeping his Kaiju powers a secret?

title: Fortitude 9.8
overview: An unexpected incident during the exam forces Kafka to use his powers at the risk of revealing his secret.

title: Joining Up!
overview: Kafka is now a member of the Defense Force, if not a full-fledged one. But Hoshina tells him he has three months to prove himself before he's fired...

title: Sagamihara Neutralization Operation at Daybreak
overview: It's time for Kafka's first mission, and he witnesses the true power of the Defense Force when a Kaiju strikes a nearby city.

title: Kaiju No. 9
overview: Reno and Iharu encounter a powerful humanoid Kaiju that quickly overwhelms them. Can help arrive in time?

title: Welcome to the Defense Force
overview: After transforming into a Kaiju to rescue Reno and Iharu, Kafka is found by Hoshina, who immediately attacks him.

title: Raid on Tachikawa Base
overview: Tachikawa base comes under attack from the air, as a powerful Kaiju has its sights set on the Defense Force.

title: Secret Revealed
overview: When the Defense Force is in danger, Kafka is forced to choose between keeping his secret and saving his comrades.

title: Kaiju No. 8 Captured
overview: Kaiju No. 8 is captured, and Kafka is at the mercy of the Defense Force's most important leaders.

title: Kafka Hibino
overview: Kafka's final fate is determined as the monster within him tries to take control.

title: Kaiju Weapon
overview: Kafka goes on a mission with his new squad and faces Kaiju No. 9 once again.

title: The Next Generation's Trial
overview: A challenge begins for the next generation of the Defense Force.

title: The Strongest Division
overview: Kaiju No. 9 appears for the third time, splitting in two and overwhelming the Defense Force.

title: The Man Called Isao Shinomiya
overview: Kaiju No. 9 reveals his true plan.

title: I Want to Be Strong
overview: Narumi and Kikoru's resolve is renewed. Kafka is forced to face the price that comes with his power.

title: Compatible User
overview: Reno Ichikawa has been chosen to wield the power of Numbers Weapon 6, the most powerful of them all.

title: Wall
overview: Iharu and Reno’s trust in each other becomes a powerful weapon that leads them in battle.

title: Destiny
overview: Kafka learns to fight without having to rely on Kaiju No. 8's power.

title: Omen
overview: A horde of Kaiju appear all over Tokyo at the same time!

title: Cataclysms
overview: The battle with No. 9's Kaiju begins in earnest.

title: Second Wave
overview: The Defense Forces suffer severe damage from a fortitude 9.0 Kaiju that appear at the capital.
